name: arctibax
flavor_texts: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.
It attacks with the blade of its frozen dorsal fin by doing a front flip in the air. Arctibax’s strong back and legs allow it to pull off this technique.
text: Arctibax is the Ice Fin Pokémon. It is a dragon and ice-type Pokémon. Abilities: thermal-exchange, ice-body (hidden). Base stats — HP: 90, Attack: 95, Defense: 66, Sp. Atk: 45, Sp. Def: 65, Speed: 62. Evolution line: frigibax → arctibax → baxcalibur. Lore: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice. It attacks with the blade of its frozen dorsal fin by doing a front flip in the air. Arctibax’s strong back and legs allow it to pull off this technique.
